posts.author: vikassethi
posts.text: The management has been talking about their Chennai Data Center for last many quarters and I was expecting some disclosure from management in month of March about its Data center. That’s what the management promised again in their last call. It did not happen. I was loosing confidence already in stock. At 1350 levels, it was looking a good price to exit for short term.

posts.author: Heavy_Luck
posts.text: Your confidence is probably shaken after the earning call. But what made you sell before the results? Were you expecting cost pressures to be as high as it turned out to be.

posts.author: vikassethi
posts.text: I personally have huge respect fo Mr. Gupta. His defensive stand and back tracking surprised me as well. Its the first time I have seen their management in defensive stance. Fortunately, I exited the stock 1 day before result the the price seemed attractive. Honestly, it will take me time to get the confidence again in the stock. Disclaimer: Sold entire holding one day before the result came. But still tracking

posts.author: dinesh111a
posts.text: Screenshot_2026-05-27-17-46-38-51_40deb401b9ffe8e1df2f1cc5ba480b12 1080×1933 236 KB They guided for 75 EPS in May 25 concall

posts.author: Heavy_Luck
posts.text: I see. Was this the first time mangement went back on their numbers or is that regulat occurance? I am just shocked at backtracking and not even owning up.

posts.author: vikassethi
posts.text: They claimed to reach 75 EPS not once but in many Analyst meets. I am 100% sure about that because I have been tracking the stock since last 5 years. Disclaimer: Sold entire holding one day before the result came. But still tracking

posts.author: Heavy_Luck
posts.text: I was tracking this stock and I am disappointed by promoter and management. In Q4 FY25 call on May 29 2025, they guided 75 EPS for FY27 and guided 100 cr from data centre for fy27 and 300-350 crore for fy28. Now one year later they have guided eps at 60 for fy27 and 75 for fy28. Also, of the 100 cr, they just are guiding 40 cr for data centers. The worst point is they flat out denied that they guided these numbers. It is litterally there in the tranacripts. Do you mind checking on that. I am surprised not that they have revised downward but not accepting that they guided these numbers ans didn…
